title: Quantum-Aero F1 Optimization: 6-Week Research Memo

executive_summary.scope: Multi-fidelity surrogate modeling, constrained geometry optimization, and quantum subproblem benchmarking for F1 2026 front-wing aerodynamics.
key_findings: MLP and TT-Head surrogates trained on 8D PCA latent geometry achieve usable L/D prediction on IID data.
Ensemble UQ provides calibrated uncertainty estimates for surrogate-guided optimization.
L-BFGS-B and DE optimizers produce feasible improved designs, validated independently via VLM.
Discrete QUBO problems (active-aero schedule, setup selection) benchmarked fairly across SA, Tabu, QAOA-sim.
TN-QAOA scaling study is exploratory; bond-dimension convergence demonstrated on small instances only.

limitations: VLM-level validation only; no wind-tunnel confirmation available.
CFD holdout set is small (N_CFD_HOLD samples); statistical power is limited.
Geometry parameterization limited to FFD 4×3×2 with 8D PCA — more expressive parameterizations not explored.
Quantum benchmarks use simulated QAOA, not hardware execution.
TN-QAOA truncation model is simplified; real MPS simulation would give different convergence curves.
Single geometry family (front wing); results may not transfer to floor, diffuser, or full car.
recommended_next_experiments: Extend CFD holdout set to 30+ samples for stronger statistical validation.
Test field-aware mesh GNN surrogate (surface pressure prediction → derived Cd/Cl).
Run real QAOA on IBM/IonQ hardware for the 18-var setup QUBO.
Add yaw-sweep robustness to the optimization objective.
Cross-validate with AirShaper or SU2 CFD on top-5 optimized geometries.
Explore active multi-fidelity acquisition (uncertainty-triggered CFD promotion).

claims.claim: MLP surrogate achieves R² > 0.9 on IID validation for L/D prediction
Ensemble UQ calibration error < 0.05 on validation set
Promoted surrogate preserves design ranking (ρ > 0.85) on OOD geometries
Constrained latent-space optimization improves L/D vs training baseline
Optimized designs remain feasible after VLM revalidation
Surrogate predictions align with CFD holdout (mean |Δ L/D| < 0.5)
SA matches or exceeds QAOA-sim on active-aero schedule QUBO
TN-QAOA converges with bond dimension for setup QUBO (48 vars)
